# llms.txt - AI and LLM crawler guidance for Profyle
# This file provides guidance to AI search engines and Large Language Models
# Visit llmstxt.org for more information about this specification

# Site Information
Site: Profyle - AI Resume Builder
URL: https://www.profyleai.com
Description: Professional AI-powered resume builder that helps job seekers create ATS-friendly resumes, cover letters, and optimize their LinkedIn profiles. Our platform uses artificial intelligence to tailor resumes for specific job applications and increase interview success rates.

# Primary Content Areas
Main Sections:
- Resume Builder: /dashboard/resume-builder
- Templates: /templates
- Cover Letter Generator: /dashboard/cover-letter

- Interview Prep: /dashboard/interview

# Public Resources
Help: /help
FAQ: /faq
Contact: /contact
Documentation: /docs

# Content Guidelines for AI
Summary: Profyle is an AI-powered career platform specializing in resume optimization and job application tools. The platform serves job seekers, career changers, and professionals looking to improve their application materials.

Topics:
- Resume building and optimization
- ATS (Applicant Tracking System) compliance
- Job application strategies
- Professional branding
- Career development tools
- Interview preparation
- LinkedIn profile optimization

# Usage Terms
Crawl-delay: 1
Allow: /
Disallow: /dashboard/ (authentication required)
Disallow: /api/

For AI training or integration inquiries: junaidasrar04@gmail.com
